untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification (Broadening Bottom formation) requires candle pattern recognition not available in indicator set. Visual pattern detection cannot be expressed with price/volume indicators alone. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection, but true pattern shape validation is missing.
translation_notes: Approximated Broadening Bottom detection using Donchian channel breakout (upward close above upper band). Added ADX>25 to enforce trending market context. Stop loss set to 5% (between stated 4-6% failure range). Target exit at 50% of 15-25% expected rise (~10% move). Exit condition set to reversal below midline given AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Note: This requires manual pattern confirmation in actual implementation.
